bird.name: 黄嘴喜鹊
bird.summary: 黄嘴喜鹊（学名：Pica nuttalli）是鸦科喜鹊属的一种，为美国加州的特有种。全球活动范围约为83,500平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 黄嘴喜鹊的平均体重约为159.0克。栖息地包括温带森林、乡村花园、耕地和牧草地。

locations.name: 北美洲
locations.summary: 北亞美利加洲（英語：North America；字源：亞美利哥·維斯普奇），簡稱北美洲，位於西半球北部（或北半球）。東臨大西洋，西臨太平洋，北瀕北冰洋，南以巴拿馬運河為界與南美洲劃分。北美洲還包括加勒比海中眾多島嶼（主要為西印度群島）。北…

relations.subject: 黄嘴喜鹊
relations.evidence: Apart from its having a yellow bill and a yellow streak around the eye and being slightly smaller, it is virtually identical to the black-billed magpie (Pica hudsonia) found in much of the rest of western North America

relations.subject: 黄嘴喜鹊
relations.evidence: The IUCN classifies the bird as a vulnerable species. The Nature Conservancy places it in the vulnerable category. Besides West Nile Virus, threats include loss of habitat and rodent poison. The bird has a limited area of distribution but is widespread throughout the area and still common in many places. Habitat Loss is the ongoing urbanization and agricultural development in California's Central Valley have led to the destruction and fragmentation of the yellow-billed magpie's preferred nesting and foraging habitats
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 黄嘴喜鹊
relations.evidence: Rodent Poison also is the use of rodenticides and pesticides in agricultural and urban areas poses a direct threat to the yellow-billed magpie population
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
